Brainmap local onboarding. Answer three predefined calibration questions.
Use a number or exact choice; any other answer stays pending clarification.
Calibration 1/3: When this project declares a formatter, what should Brainmap prefer?
  1) follow project configuration
  2) ask user
Answer: Calibration 2/3: When this project declares a test command, what should Brainmap prefer?
  1) follow project configuration
  2) ask user
Answer: Calibration 3/3: Without an existing preference, how should Brainmap handle a dependency change?
  1) ask user
  2) make the smallest reversible change
Answer: Optionally add more concrete recurring decisions.
Additional situation (leave empty to finish): onboarding schema: brainmap-onboarding-v1
